market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: £135 Modern Apt 1 Mile from City – 23% Below Avg
Cozy 1‑Bed Apartment, 4 Guests, 1 Mile to Centre
Bright Modern Flat, 23% Cheaper, Near City
analysis.rewritten_desc: Enjoy a stylish, modern half‑bedroom apartment just one mile from the city centre, perfect for up to four guests. This entire home offers a bright living space with contemporary décor, a fully equipped kitchen, and a comfortable sleeping area that sleeps two adults and two children or friends. At £135 per night, the rate is 23% lower than the city’s median nightly price of £175, giving you great value without compromising on comfort. The apartment is located in a quiet neighbourhood yet only a short walk or easy public‑transport ride to major attractions, shopping, and dining. With 493 reviews and an overall rating of 4.39, previous guests appreciate the clean, well‑maintained space and the host’s responsive communication. While the listing is not yet a Superhost, the high review count reflects consistent guest satisfaction. The next 90 days show 28.3% occupancy (65 open nights), indicating ample opportunity to attract more bookings, especially at this competitive price. Whether you’re visiting for business, a short city break, or a family getaway, this modern flat provides a convenient, affordable base to explore the city’s vibrant culture and landmarks.
top_amenity_gaps: Dedicated parking or secure bike storage
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a bright, wide‑angle shot of the living area with city views as the cover photo – it showcases the modern décor and proximity to the centre, driving higher click‑through rates.
key_diagnosis: Highlight the 23% price advantage in the title and description – your rate of £135 is £40 below the cohort median of £175, a strong selling point that’s currently missing.
Add high‑value amenities (outdoor balcony, free parking, streaming TV) to the amenities list – these categories are absent and are proven to boost search ranking and guest appeal.

Upload a full set of high‑quality photos (minimum 8, covering living room, bedroom, kitchen, bathroom, view, and a cover image) – the listing currently has an unknown photo count, far below the market average of 12 images.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your nightly rate is £135, which is 23% lower than the city’s median of £175 yet your 90‑day occupancy sits at just 28.3% – there’s clear upside to capture more bookings.
